steps.title: Spot the matching observation
steps.content: Anecdotal evidence suggested fungi maintain cooler temperatures. The experimental findings now show this same observation — fungi maintained lower temperatures in the lab. The blank must express that the experimental results validate the earlier suggestion.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
Corroborate means to confirm or support with evidence.

The experimental findings serve this function — they provide evidence for what was anecdotally suggested.

The other three don't express confirmation: obscure makes unclear, curtail reduces, and encapsulate merely summarizes.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
